creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 190816
Add dependency on xsltproc if both MANPAGES and X11 are enabled

Hi,

I'm going to have to dig into this a little bit more... we had a similar report after the initial update to -rc1, but it was promptly addressed in r458109 and it works in both my Poudriere and the build cluster.

In the meantime, please try this patch; it adds a dependency on xsltproc if both MANPAGES and X11 are enabled.
